query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.alunoId, u.openId, u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL as hasPassword, a.cpf FROM users u LEFT JOIN alunos a ON u.alunoId = a.id WHERE u.alunoId IS NOT NULL AND u.role = 'user' AND (u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL OR a.cpf IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.alunoId, u.openId, u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL as hasPassword, a.cpf FROM users u LEFT JOIN alunos a ON u.alunoId = a.id WHERE u.alunoId IS NOT NULL AND u.role = 'user' AND (u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL OR a.cpf IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 5
